summary: Retweet of a Department of Labor video set to music. It mixes black-and-white illustrations of a cheering crowd with color-graded footage of Trump and Melania descending a White House staircase, Trump in silhouette pointing at a large backlit flag, and a low-angle shot of Trump against the sky. The title 'THE AMERICAN REVIVAL' recurs. Trump narration: 'one year ago our country was dead... now we are the hottest country anywhere in the world.'

script.scene: Black-and-white illustration of a cheering crowd; title 'THE AMERICAN REVIVAL'; music and Trump narration begin: 'one year ago our country was dead...'
Sepia footage of Trump and Melania descending a White House staircase; 'THE AMERICAN REVIVAL' overlay.
Silhouette of Trump pointing toward a large backlit U.S. flag onstage; 'THE AMERICAN REVIVAL.'
Low-angle shot of Trump against a cloudy sky; 'THE AMERICAN REVIVAL'; narration: 'now we are the hottest country anywhere in the world.'
Black end card with the white Department of Labor seal.

notable_text: THE AMERICAN REVIVAL; (tweet) Patriotism is Prevailing. The American Revival is here.
